data.name: Settings_LanguageHint
data.value: Restart not required — most surfaces switch immediately. A few labels (already-rendered tray submenus) refresh on next interaction.

data.name: Settings_ClipboardSectionHint
data.value: Display options for the clipboard window.

data.name: Settings_ClipboardShowSnippetWithLabelTooltip
data.value: When an item has a label, also render a small preview of its content on a second line. Off by default — the label replaces the snippet entirely.

data.name: Clipboard_TooltipExtEditor
data.value: Edit text in external editor (VSCode / Notepad / …)

data.name: Clipboard_TooltipCaptureWebpage
data.value: Capture webpage (full-page screenshot of the URL)

data.name: Clipboard_TooltipPinned
data.value: Toggle pinned (sticky) mode — popup stays open after paste / double-click. Esc or Win+V still dismiss.

data.name: Launcher_DragModeBanner
data.value: 🎯 Drag-and-drop mode — drop files / folders / shortcuts onto cells to map them. Esc or click toggle to exit.

data.name: LauncherCellEdit_ClearTooltip
data.value: Empty this cell — removes the mapping.

data.name: LauncherCellEdit_PathPlaceholder
data.value: exe / file / folder / URL — anything the shell can open

data.name: LauncherCellEdit_IconPlaceholder
data.value: (optional — custom .ico / .png / .jpg overriding the default shell icon)

data.name: LauncherCellEdit_IconIndexTooltip
data.value: Icon index inside a multi-icon container (.dll / .exe / .ico). 0 = first.

data.name: LauncherCellEdit_ClearIcon
data.value: Clear the custom icon (revert to default shell icon).

data.name: LauncherCellEdit_RunAsAdminTooltip
data.value: Launch with the "runas" verb so Windows prompts UAC for elevation. Use sparingly — admin processes can change system state.

data.name: LauncherCellEdit_WindowModeTooltip
data.value: How the launched window appears initially. Most GUI apps honour Maximized/Minimized; some ignore the hint. Hidden runs the process without showing a window — useful for headless tasks.

data.name: LauncherCellEdit_WindowTitlePlaceholder
data.value: (if a window with this title is open, focus it instead of launching)

data.name: LauncherCellEdit_ProcessNamePlaceholder
data.value: (if a process with this name is running, focus it — e.g. notepad)

data.name: LauncherCellEdit_AdvancedHint
data.value: Window title / process name: substring match (case-insensitive). Either one being non-empty enables "activate if already running" mode — the cell focuses the existing window instead of starting a new instance. Leave both empty for the default "always launch" behaviour.

data.name: Launcher_TooltipSearch
data.value: Filter cells by label or path. Empty cells and the F-row are unaffected; tabs without matches lose their title.

data.name: Launcher_TooltipDragMode
data.value: Toggle drag-and-drop mode — the launcher stays open and cells accept dropped files / folders / shortcuts.

data.name: Launcher_TabRenameHint
data.value: Right-click to rename this tab — drop a file to switch tab without firing.

data.name: Launcher_HelpHint
data.value: F1-F10 fire global · 1-9,0 / arrows switch tab · QWERTY fires tab cell · Esc closes · right-click to edit

data.name: Uploaders_Blurb
data.value: Pick which uploaders to use per content type. Multiple selections upload the same file to all of them; the resulting URLs end up on the clipboard, one per line.

data.name: Hotkeys_Blurb
data.value: Click the workflow name to open its step list. Click the hotkey chip to set / change / clear the key combo.

data.name: Hotkeys_StepEditorBlurb
data.value: Add actions with the picker below; drag the ⋮⋮ handle to reorder; toggle to mute without removing; × removes. Plumbing steps run automatically and aren't shown.

data.name: Capture_Blurb
data.value: Defaults applied when triggering captures from the tray menu or hotkeys. The pipeline that runs after each capture is configured under Workflows.

data.name: Theme_Blurb
data.value: Two colors that flow everywhere AresToys uses an accent: primary buttons, toggle switches, the pinned-image border, drag-to-reorder indicators, and selected sidebar entries. Edit the hex values to see the changes apply live.

data.name: Categories_Blurb
data.value: Categories are buckets for clipboard items. Right-click any item in the popup → Move to → … to file it. Items in deleted categories return to the default 'Clipboard' bucket; pinned items keep their pin.

data.name: Settings_Blurb
data.value: App-level preferences. Toggle behaviours that don't belong on a specific feature page.

data.name: Settings_StartWithWindowsTooltip
data.value: Adds (or removes) AresToys to the per-user Windows startup list. No admin rights needed.

data.name: QrGenerator_PlaceholderInput
data.value: Paste a URL, text, vCard, Wi-Fi credentials, …

data.name: QrGenerator_TooltipCopyImage
data.value: Copy the QR PNG to the Windows clipboard

data.name: QrGenerator_TooltipSaveHistory
data.value: Save the QR PNG to the screenshot folder + insert into the clipboard history (same flow as captures)

data.name: QrGenerator_TooltipSaveSvg
data.value: Save as scalable vector — keeps sharp at any size

data.name: QrGenerator_StatusFail
data.value: Couldn't generate QR (text may be too long for this ECC level).

data.name: Settings_StartMinimizedTooltip
data.value: Skip the main window on launch and stay in the tray. Click the tray icon to open the Settings window when needed.

data.name: Settings_EditorStartMaximizedTooltip
data.value: Open the editor maximized on the active monitor when launched outside a workflow (toast click, history). Workflow tasks have their own fullscreen toggle which overrides this.

data.name: Settings_EditorSectionHint
data.value: Behaviour knobs for the image editor (shapes, selection, gestures).

data.name: Settings_WindowsIntegrationHint
data.value: How AresToys plugs into the OS: autostart, initial window state, and the tray icon's click routing.

data.name: Settings_ModulesHint
data.value: Disable subsystems you don't use. Disabled modules skip their startup pre-warm, background hooks, hotkeys and tray entries, so they cost nothing at runtime.

data.name: Settings_ModuleClipboardTooltip
data.value: Captures every copy event, stores it in SQLite, and exposes the Win+V popup. Disabling stops all clipboard interception and database writes.

data.name: Settings_ModuleLauncherTooltip
data.value: Keyboard-driven app launcher overlay (F1-F10 strip + numeric tabs × QWERTY cells). Disabling skips its hotkey, tray entry and icon-cache pre-warming.

data.name: Settings_ModuleWormholesTooltip
data.value: Transparent windows pinned to the desktop layer that mirror folders or hold curated shortcuts. Feature is in development — enable to opt into early builds.

data.name: Settings_ModulesRestartHint
data.value: Module gates run only at startup — restart to apply.

data.name: Settings_EditorAltClickSelectAny
data.value: Alt+click selects any shape (not only same type)

data.name: Settings_EditorAltClickSelectAnyTooltip
data.value: While a placement tool is active (Rectangle, Arrow, Ellipse…) alt+click always tries to select an existing shape of the SAME type under the cursor. Alt+Shift+click toggles the hit shape into / out of the current selection set (multi-select). This option controls what happens when no same-type shape is found: ON = select any shape under the cursor (no placement); OFF (default) = fall through to a normal placement.

data.name: Settings_TrayClicksHint
data.value: Pick what each click on the tray icon should do. Right-click always opens the menu.

data.name: Settings_ImageEffectsHint
data.value: Define preset chains of adjustments, filters and drawings (ShareX-compatible). Open the editor to add effects to a preset and preview the result on a sample image. Imports ShareX .sxie presets directly.

data.name: Settings_SxieAssociation
data.value: Set AresToys as the default app for .sxie files

data.name: Settings_SxieAssociationHint
data.value: When on, double-clicking a .sxie file in Explorer opens the image-effects editor with the preset already imported — same flow as ShareX. Per-user only — doesn't touch system-wide settings or need admin rights.

data.name: Settings_BackupHint
data.value: Export every non-sensitive AresToys setting (theme, hotkeys, launcher cells, workflow steps, capture defaults, plugin selection) to a single JSON file you can sync between machines. Sensitive values (OAuth tokens, credentials) are not included — they'd be unusable on another box anyway.

data.name: Hotkeys_DuplicateTooltip
data.value: Clone this workflow into a new editable copy

data.name: Hotkeys_RemoveTooltip
data.value: Delete this workflow (built-ins can't be deleted)

data.name: Hotkeys_ResetTooltip
data.value: Restore this built-in workflow's original steps and hotkey.

data.name: Capture_SubFolderPlaceholder
data.value: e.g. %y-%mo → 2026-04 sub-folder under the save folder

data.name: Capture_SubFolderHint
data.value: Tokens: %y / %yy 4-digit / 2-digit year, %mo month (01–12), %mon month name, %d day, %h hour, %mi minute, %s second, %pm AM/PM. Leave empty for no sub-folder.

data.name: Capture_AutoJpeg
data.value: Auto-switch to JPEG when output exceeds threshold

data.name: Capture_AutoJpegHint
data.value: Active only when format = PNG. Photographic content (gradients, video stills) compresses far more efficiently as JPEG; large screenshots fall back automatically without you noticing.

data.name: Capture_ExternalEditorHint
data.value: Used by the clipboard popup's Edit button on text rows. Examples: code (VSCode), code.cmd, notepad++.exe, notepad. Edits sync back automatically when you save the file.

data.name: Theme_SurfacesHint
data.value: Surface 1 → input fields and list rows. Surface 2 → main window body. Surface 3 → elevated panels and drag handles.

data.name: Theme_TooltipSwatch
data.value: Click to open the color picker

data.name: Theme_ForegroundLightHint
data.value: Text / icon colour drawn on top of the accent background — pick one with enough contrast (e.g. white on a dark accent, near-black on a light one).

data.name: Theme_ForegroundDarkHint
data.value: Subtext colour — captions, age / kind / source on clipboard rows, descriptions on this page. Tweak it to soften or sharpen secondary text across the whole app.

data.name: Theme_AccentBackgroundDarkHint
data.value: Used by the launcher overlay (cell backgrounds, inactive tab headers). Pick a low-luminance shade so the main accent reads on top of it.

data.name: Theme_AccentDangerHint
data.value: Tints the trash / delete buttons across the app (clipboard toolbar, category remove, 'Clear all'). Tweak it to a shade that contrasts cleanly with your accent colour.

data.name: Debug_CopyAllTooltip
data.value: Copy the visible log to the clipboard for pasting into a bug report

data.name: Debug_ClearTooltip
data.value: Drop every entry in the buffer

data.name: Debug_AutoScrollTooltip
data.value: Locks the view to the most recent entry. Uncheck while scrolling up to read older lines.

data.name: Hotkeys_NoCustomYet
data.value: (none yet — click + Add custom workflow below to create one)

data.name: ColorPicker_TooltipCopyAll
data.value: Copy every format on separate lines.

data.name: ColorPicker_TooltipSampler
data.value: Sample a pixel from anywhere on screen

data.name: ColorPicker_TooltipSrgb
data.value: Apply sRGB gamma to the preview swatches / sliders / wheel. Disable to see colors interpreted as linear (closer to how renderers like Unreal treat texture pixels).

data.name: ColorPicker_TooltipWheel
data.value: HSV wheel — Hue around the rim, Saturation centre→edge. V on the slider.

data.name: ColorPicker_TooltipSquare
data.value: SV square at fixed Hue — every pixel a distinct colour, all of S×V on a single drag.

data.name: ImageEffects_TooltipMoveUp
data.value: Move up — order matters: each effect runs on the output of the previous one.

data.name: ImageEffects_TooltipUniform
data.value: When on, editing one side updates all four

data.name: ImageEffects_TooltipLiveUpdate
data.value: Re-render during slider drag (~30 fps) instead of waiting for the drag to settle.

data.name: ImageEffects_TooltipApplyToEditor
data.value: Render the current preset against the editor's source image and send the result back as the new editor canvas (undoable).

data.name: ImageEffects_TooltipOverridePreset
data.value: Save the current slider / parameter changes back to the preset. By default editor-mode tweaks are one-shot — they affect this screenshot only without modifying the saved preset.

data.name: Update_StatusNotInstalled
data.value: Updates only work from an installed copy (current build is dev / portable-extracted).

data.name: Clipboard_FilterClickToHide
data.value: Click to hide all of these.

data.name: Clipboard_FilterTextBullet1
data.value: • Plain text (everything you copy as text)

data.name: Clipboard_FilterTextBullet2
data.value: • HTML (browsers' Copy link / Copy image address)

data.name: Clipboard_FilterTextBullet3
data.value: • RTF (formatted text from Word / Outlook / etc.)

data.name: Clipboard_FooterHint
data.value: ↑↓ navigate · 1-9 focus · Enter paste · Ctrl+1-9 quick paste · ←→ switch category · Ctrl+F search · Ctrl+P pin · Ctrl+Shift+Del clear all · Esc close

data.name: Param_AutoHide
data.value: Auto hide if out of bounds

data.name: CustomUploaders_Blurb
data.value: ShareX-compatible declarative uploaders. Each .sxcu file becomes its own destination — toggle them on/off in the category tabs after a restart.

data.name: CustomUploaders_SxcuAssociation
data.value: Set AresToys as the default app for .sxcu files

data.name: CustomUploaders_SxcuAssociationHint
data.value: When on, double-clicking a .sxcu file in Explorer opens AresToys and prompts you to install it. Per-user only — doesn't touch system-wide settings or need admin rights.

data.name: CustomUploaders_ExplorerVerb
data.value: Show 'Upload with AresToys' in the Explorer right-click menu

data.name: CustomUploaders_ExplorerVerbHint
data.value: Adds an 'Upload with AresToys' entry to the right-click menu on every file. On Windows 11 you'll find it under 'Show more options'. The entry is always visible — clicking it forwards the file to a running AresToys, or starts one in tray-only mode if not running.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_record_screen_mp4
data.value: Toggle FFmpeg-driven screen recording in mp4 format. First invocation starts, second stops and produces the file.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_record_screen_gif
data.value: Toggle FFmpeg-driven screen recording in animated GIF format. First invocation starts, second stops and produces the file.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_press_key_enter
data.value: Send a single Enter keystroke to the foreground window. Useful as a separator between paste steps when chaining clipboard items onto consecutive lines.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_press_key_tab
data.value: Send a single Tab keystroke to the foreground window — handy for moving between fields between paste steps.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_upload_image
data.value: Run every uploader the user has selected for the image category (Settings → Plugins → image).

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_upload_file
data.value: Run every uploader the user has selected for the file category (Settings → Plugins → file).

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_upload_text
data.value: Run every uploader the user has selected for the text category (Settings → Plugins → text).

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_upload_video
data.value: Run every uploader the user has selected for the video category (Settings → Plugins → video).

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_upload_url
data.value: Run every URL shortener the user has selected (Settings → Uploaders → URL). Input must be a valid absolute URL.

data.name: WorkflowActionParam_arestoys_open_editor_before_upload_fullscreen
data.value: Open fullscreen on active monitor (fit to screen)

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_capture_region
data.value: Show the region selection overlay and capture the chosen rectangle. Skipped automatically when a payload is already in the bag.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_capture_active_window
data.value: Snapshot the currently-foreground window using DWM extended-frame-bounds (no resize-border padding). Honours the global capture delay; own-process windows are skipped.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_capture_active_monitor
data.value: Snapshot the monitor currently under the mouse cursor — useful as a hotkey on multi-monitor setups. On single-monitor it just captures the whole screen.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_capture_webpage
data.value: Render a URL in a hidden WebView2 and grab a full-page PNG. Leave URL empty to be prompted at runtime; set it for fully-automated 'snapshot example.com' workflows.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_record_screen
data.value: Toggle FFmpeg-driven screen recording. First invocation starts, second stops and produces the file.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_color_sampler
data.value: Open the magnifier-style sampler at the cursor — picks a pixel from anywhere on screen. The sampled color is copied to the clipboard.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_color_picker
data.value: Open the dialog-style HSB/RGB/CMYK colour picker (wheel + numeric inputs). Pair with a Copy color as … step to write the result to the clipboard.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_copy_color_hex
data.value: Emit the bag colour as RRGGBB (or RRGGBBAA with alpha). Toggles below choose whether to include alpha and whether to prefix with #.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_copy_color_rgb
data.value: Emit the bag colour as rgb(R, G, B) to the clipboard.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_copy_color_rgba
data.value: Emit the bag colour as rgba(R, G, B, A) with alpha 0–1 to the clipboard.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_copy_color_hsb
data.value: Emit the bag colour as hsb(H°, S%, B%) to the clipboard.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_copy_color_cmyk
data.value: Emit the bag colour as cmyk(C%, M%, Y%, K%) to the clipboard.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_copy_color_decimal
data.value: Emit the bag colour as the packed AARRGGBB integer to the clipboard.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_copy_color_linear
data.value: Emit (R=…,G=…,B=…,A=…) — Unreal Engine FLinearColor stringification — to the clipboard.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_copy_color_bgra
data.value: Emit (B=…,G=…,R=…,A=…) — Unreal Engine FColor stringification — to the clipboard.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_open_editor_before_upload
data.value: Pause the pipeline and open the annotation editor on the captured bytes. On save, subsequent steps see the edited image.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_apply_image_effects_preset
data.value: Run a saved chain of adjustments / filters on the image (border, watermark, vignette …). Configure presets in Settings → Image effects.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_save_to_file
data.value: Write the current bytes to disk under the configured capture folder (Settings → Capture). 'Format' is optional: leave empty for the bag's current format.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_add_to_history
data.value: Index the item in AresToys's history so it shows up in Win+V.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_copy_image_to_clipboard
data.value: Place the bitmap on the Windows clipboard (Ctrl+V in any other app pastes it). Distinct from 'Add to clipboard history'.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_paste_history_item
data.value: Auto-paste the N-th most recent clipboard history item into the foreground window. 1 = most recent.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_press_key
data.value: Send a single keystroke to the foreground window. Useful between paste steps when chaining clipboard items onto consecutive lines.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_delay
data.value: Pause the workflow for the configured number of milliseconds. Useful between paste / press-key steps when the target window is slow to process keystrokes.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_copy_text_to_clipboard
data.value: Replace the Windows clipboard content with the upload URL(s) returned by the upload step.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_upload
data.value: Run every uploader the user has selected for the chosen category (Settings → Plugins).

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_upload_clipboard_text
data.value: Pull the current text from the system clipboard and stage it as the workflow's payload (UTF-8). Pair with an Upload step (text category) to publish.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_capture_selected_explorer_file
data.value: Read the file currently selected in the foreground Explorer window and stage its bytes as the workflow's payload. Aborts silently when nothing is selected.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_qr_read
data.value: Decode the first QR code found in the current image. Replaces the payload with the decoded UTF-8 text. Aborts the workflow when no QR is found.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_update_item_url
data.value: Persist the upload URL on the history item so the popup shows it.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_notify_toast
data.value: Display a Windows toast confirming the operation. Click opens the URL when present.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_open_popup
data.value: Open the AresToys clipboard window (Win+V replacement). Pressing the same shortcut again while it's up dismisses it.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_toggle_incognito
data.value: Flip incognito on/off — when on, clipboard items aren't captured into history.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_open_screenshot_folder
data.value: Open the configured capture folder (Settings → Capture) in Windows Explorer.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_show_in_explorer
data.value: Open Windows Explorer with the just-saved file pre-selected. Requires a preceding Save to file step.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_save_as
data.value: Open a Save File dialog so the user picks the destination + filename. The chosen path becomes the new local_path for subsequent steps.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_open_url
data.value: Launch the default browser on the upload URL (or an explicit URL via config). Useful right after an Upload step.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_show_qr_code
data.value: Generate a QR code from the upload URL (or explicit text) and pop a small window. Handy for scanning the link on a phone.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_save_qr_as_image
data.value: Generate a QR PNG and write it to disk. Auto-saves to config.path when set, otherwise prompts with a Save dialog.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_save_qr_as_svg
data.value: Same as Save QR as image but produces a scalable SVG document — sharp at any size, ideal for print or slides.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_copy_qr_to_clipboard
data.value: Generate a QR PNG and place it on the Windows clipboard. Paste-ready in any app that accepts images.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_pin_to_screen
data.value: Show the captured image in an always-on-top window. Drag to move, wheel to zoom, right-click or Esc to close.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_launch_app
data.value: Start an executable, shortcut, or batch file. Path supports %ENV% expansion. Args are passed verbatim to the target.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_open_file
data.value: Open a file or folder with its default OS-registered handler — same as double-clicking in Explorer.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_run_command
data.value: Run a shell command line via cmd /c — supports PATH lookups, pipes, redirects, chained commands. Fire-and-forget.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_open_launcher_menu
data.value: Show the launcher overlay — a 3×10 keyboard grid where every printable key fires a path / shortcut / shell target.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_open_settings
data.value: Show + activate the main AresToys Settings window.

data.name: WorkflowActionDesc_arestoys_open_launcher_drag_mode
data.value: Show the launcher overlay already in drag-and-drop mode: drag files / folders / shortcuts onto cells to map them.

data.name: Editor_NoSelection
data.value: Select a shape to edit its properties (V tool, then click).

data.name: Editor_TooltipSave
data.value: Confirm / copy to clipboard. Adds the edited image as a new history item and pushes it to the Windows clipboard so you can paste it. The original is preserved.

data.name: Editor_TooltipSaveAs
data.value: Export to a file you pick. Format chosen via the dialog filter (PNG / JPEG / BMP / GIF). Does not touch history.

data.name: Editor_TooltipCancel
data.value: Discard edits and close. The original stays in history; the Windows clipboard is not changed.

data.name: Editor_TooltipSmoothStroke
data.value: Apply Chaikin corner-cutting + Catmull-Rom rendering to remove hand jitter from this stroke.

data.name: Editor_TooltipStartCap
data.value: Add an arrowhead at the start of the line / freehand stroke, oriented along the tangent at that endpoint.

data.name: Editor_TooltipEndCap
data.value: Add an arrowhead at the end of the line / freehand stroke, oriented along the tangent at that endpoint.

data.name: Editor_TooltipTipStyle
data.value: Visual style of the cap geometry — ShareX curve (V with concave base, integrates with stroke) or solid filled triangle.

data.name: Editor_TooltipApplyToSelected
data.value: Apply the default outline / fill / stroke above to the selected shape(s)

data.name: Editor_TooltipSetAsDefault
data.value: Use the selected shape's outline/fill/stroke as the toolbar's current values

data.name: Editor_Tool_SmartEraser
data.value: K Smart eraser — fills the rect with a bilinear gradient of the 4 corner colors

data.name: BgRemover_StatusReady
data.value: Ready. Adjust sliders or paint with the brush to refine the cut-out.

data.name: BgRemover_StatusModelUnavailable
data.value: Background-removal model unavailable. Cancel and retry, or close to keep the original image.

data.name: BgRemover_StatusDecodeFailed
data.value: Source image could not be decoded.

data.name: Trace_FailMessage
data.value: Tracing failed — potrace.exe may be missing from the install. Check the log.
